touches.ai_summary: Outbound LinkedIn message sent to Brandon Yoon introducing AskElephant's forecasting capabilities for PropTech teams. No response received.
Brief cold call with Brandon Yoon. Rep introduced AskElephant's revenue forecasting platform. Brandon showed initial interest in learning more about automation capabilities for their RevOps team.

questions_asked.question: What exactly does your platform do differently than our current Excel-based forecasting?
questions_asked.answer: AskElephant uses AI to analyze pipeline signals in real-time and provides automated forecast updates, reducing manual work by 80%.

next_steps: Brandon to check calendar for qualification call next week

touches.ai_summary: Qualification call with Brandon Yoon to understand CosmicHub's current forecasting process. Brandon described challenges with forecast accuracy and manual data entry across their 27-person RevOps team. Rep explored pain points around end-of-quarter scrambles.

questions_asked.question: How are you currently handling forecast updates across your team?
questions_asked.answer: We're using spreadsheets and Salesforce reports, but it's very manual. Each analyst spends 5-6 hours per week just updating numbers.

questions_asked.question: Does this integrate with our existing Salesforce instance?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, native integration with Salesforce. Sync is real-time and doesn't require any data migration.

questions_asked.question: What's driving the need to solve this now?
questions_asked.answer: Our CEO has been pushing for better predictability. Last two quarters we missed our forecast by 15%+.

next_steps: Brandon to share current forecasting workflow documentation
Schedule follow-up to discuss team structure and use cases

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up qualification call with Brandon. Discussed team roles and identified key stakeholders including Diego Rodriguez on the technical side. Brandon confirmed budget authority and timeline to implement before Q3.

questions_asked.question: Who else should be involved in evaluating this solution?
questions_asked.answer: I'll need to bring in Diego Rodriguez from our RevOps analytics team. He'll want to vet the technical side.

questions_asked.question: What's the typical implementation timeline?
questions_asked.answer: Usually 2-3 weeks from contract signature to full rollout, depending on data complexity.

next_steps: Brandon to introduce Diego Rodriguez for technical evaluation
Schedule discovery call to dive deeper into automation requirements

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call with Brandon focused on automation use cases. Brandon emphasized need for unlimited automation to support forecasting across multiple product lines. Rep presented tiered packaging options.

questions_asked.question: Can we automate forecast adjustments based on deal stage changes?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely. That's one of our core automation workflows. You can set rules by stage, deal size, or any custom field.

questions_asked.question: How many automation workflows do you anticipate needing?
questions_asked.answer: At least 8-10 to start. We have different forecast models for our core PropTech product versus our analytics add-ons.

next_steps: Rep to send unlimited automation tier pricing
Coordinate technical evaluation session with Diego

touches.ai_summary: Technical evaluation call with Diego Rodriguez. Deep dive into AskElephant's data model, API capabilities, and integration architecture. Diego asked detailed questions about data security, SLA guarantees, and custom reporting. Rep provided technical documentation and API sandbox access.

questions_asked.question: What's your data retention policy and can we export historical forecasts?
questions_asked.answer: Unlimited retention on our platform, full export capability via API or UI. All data remains your property.

questions_asked.question: How do you handle custom fields from Salesforce?
questions_asked.answer: We map all standard and custom fields automatically. You can build automation rules on any field.

questions_asked.question: What specific integrations beyond Salesforce would you need?
questions_asked.answer: We use HubSpot for marketing data and would want to pull that into forecasting eventually. Also Slack for notifications.

questions_asked.question: What are your uptime SLAs?
questions_asked.answer: 99.9% uptime SLA with redundant infrastructure and 24/7 monitoring.

objections: Diego raised concern about lack of native HubSpot integration on unlimited tier
next_steps: Rep to confirm HubSpot connector roadmap timing
Diego to complete technical security review with InfoSec team

touches.ai_summary: Second technical session with Diego focused on hands-on demo of automation builder and reporting interface. Diego tested several workflow scenarios and asked about scalability as team grows. Rep walked through customer case studies from similar PropTech companies.

questions_asked.question: If we expand from 27 to 40 seats next year, what's the pricing impact?
questions_asked.answer: Seat pricing stays flat on annual contracts. You can add seats mid-contract at prorated cost.

questions_asked.question: Are you comfortable with the automation builder interface for your team?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, looks straightforward. Reese and Mason should be able to build workflows without engineering help.

questions_asked.question: Can we set different permission levels for end users versus admins?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, role-based access control is built in. You can restrict automation editing to specific users.

next_steps: Diego to provide technical approval to Brandon
Schedule proposal review call with Brandon

touches.ai_summary: Proposal review call with Brandon. Rep presented formal proposal for 27 seats with unlimited automation tier at $30,500 ACV. Brandon expressed concern about budget and requested discount to get closer to $24K target.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility on this pricing? We were hoping to stay under $25K.
questions_asked.answer: Let me discuss with leadership. The unlimited tier typically doesn't discount heavily, but given your team size I can explore options.

questions_asked.question: What's the approval process on your end once we align on pricing?
questions_asked.answer: I have budget authority up to $30K. Anything above that needs VP Finance approval, but below that I can move quickly.

objections: Brandon pushed back on initial pricing, cited budget constraints for Q2
next_steps: Rep to return with revised pricing options
Brandon to confirm final stakeholder sign-offs needed

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent to Brandon with revised proposal at $23,900 ACV (21.7% discount from list). Email outlined discount justification based on multi-year potential and referenced Diego's positive technical review. Brandon responded confirming the price works and requesting final contract terms.

questions_asked.question: Can we include a quarterly business review in the contract terms?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, QBRs are standard for accounts your size. We'll assign a dedicated CSM.

next_steps: Rep to send contract with QBR terms included
Brandon to route for internal review

touches.ai_summary: Pricing alignment call with Brandon to finalize contract terms. Discussed payment schedule, implementation timeline, and success metrics. Brandon confirmed $23,900 pricing approved internally and requested Net 30 payment terms.

questions_asked.question: What payment terms can you offer? We typically do Net 30.
questions_asked.answer: Net 30 works for us. We can include that in the contract.

questions_asked.question: When would you want to kick off implementation?
questions_asked.answer: Ideally first week of next month so we're live before mid-quarter forecast cycle.

next_steps: Rep to send final contract with Net 30 terms
Brandon to review with Finance and return signed agreement

touches.ai_summary: Final negotiation call with Brandon to address contract red-lines from CosmicHub legal team. Discussed data processing terms, liability caps, and renewal language. Brandon confirmed all terms acceptable and committed to signature by end of week.

questions_asked.question: Can we adjust the auto-renewal clause to require 60-day notice instead of 90?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we can accommodate 60-day notice for cancellation.

questions_asked.question: Any other blockers on your end before signature?
questions_asked.answer: No, legal is satisfied. Just need final exec signature from our VP Finance as courtesy approval.

questions_asked.question: When can we expect implementation kickoff materials?
questions_asked.answer: We'll send onboarding docs within 24 hours of signed contract and schedule kickoff call for the following week.

next_steps: Brandon to obtain VP Finance courtesy signature
Contract signature expected by end of week
Implementation kickoff scheduled pending signature
